zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Quartermain於大約1307年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾比斯特時，他的父親William Quartermain49歲，母親Maude22歲。他和Quartermain至少有2個兒子。他去世於1379年在英國奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Quartermain于大约1307年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾比斯特时，他的父亲William Quartermain49岁，母亲Maude22岁。他和Quartermain至少有2个儿子。他去世于1379年在英国奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Quartermain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Quarterman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Germaine, Marcel, Pascal.

English (Oxfordshire and Surrey): nickname from Anglo-Norman French quatre mayns, quatre mans ‘four hands’, which has been taken to imply ‘mail-fisted’ but was perhaps used of a skilled craftsman or a dextrous juggler or conjuror.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Quartermain was born about 1307, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Quartermain, was 49 and his mother, Maude, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Quartermain. He died in 1379, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Quartermain est né environ 1307, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Quartermain, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Maude, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Quartermain. Il est décédé en 1379, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Quartermain um 1307 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Quartermain 49 und seine Mutter Maude 22. Er hatte mit Quartermain mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 73 Jahren in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Quartermain è nato il circa 1307 nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Quartermain, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Maude, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Quartermain. Morì nel 1379, nel North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Quartermainが約1307年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターで生まれた時，父William Quartermainは49歳，母Maudeは22歳であった。彼はQuartermainとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1379年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Quartermain(이)가 대략 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Quartermain(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Quartermain(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1379년 영국 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Quartermain nasceu aproximadamente 1307, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Quartermain, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Maude, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Quartermain. Ele faleceu em 1379, em North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Quartermain родился около 1307 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Quartermain было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Quartermain. Он умер в 1379 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Quartermain nació aproximadamente 1307, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Quartermain, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Maude, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Quartermain. Murió en 1379, en North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
